reviews.review_description: Without a doubt is in my top 3 favorite rhythm boxing apps.  It really pushes you hard and doesn't go easy on you with the final scoring.  I kept getting grades I wasnt happy with which pushed me harder to get the A and B scores. A great physically demanding app!

I do enjoy the the game,  music is decent, wish there was more R&B. My biggest complaint is the ending if you don't get a good score the overhead says Disapointing and you suck. Discouraging even on the easy level. Kinda a drag. I'll probably download a different game because I can't figure out what I am doing wrong . I'm hitting almost all the targets. Maybe just me, seems impossible to level up. And the Discouraging statements are a bummer 😕. I'll check it out in a few months.

UPDATE:
I do not know, how to use these 1000s custom songs. Under DLC there is only 2 items saying "COMING SOON!" (The folder named CustomSongs is on my Q2 but not visible in game and not clear where to get/download any new beatmaps.)
--------------------------------------
Compared with similar existing games, this one is a higher price, not so polished, partially custom difficulty, but not enough songs and mainly - no custom MP3s..
Still, I like some customization/variability it has.. so I keep it for now..

developer_response.body:
UPDATE:
if you could please follow the guide here
www.khosouf.com/customsongs
and if you faced any issues feel free to contact us on our discord server and we'll gladly help you out step by step.
---------------------------------------
Hi there John!
Thank you for the constructive criticism,  rest assured we are updating the game constantly and are not stopping any time soon.
Though If i may encourage you to join our discord, or visit www.khosouf.com/customsongs, you'll find the way to add 1000s of custom songs into the game.

Happy to hear your detailed feedback soon!
Thanks!
___________

reviews.review_description: I was initially put off by the look of this but it’s a great workout app to add to my collection,love some of the music,the metal tracks are really good.Only thing I don’t like is the opposite hand punches that sometimes come as these aren’t natural and throw me off a little.I’d probably add a bit more polish and increase the haptic feedback as this feels a bit weak,other than that great job

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the honest review :)!
we have about 40 new songs that are going to be added to the game's Season 2! bet you'll love them!

and i'll boost up the haptic feedback to the max in the coming patches, thank you for pointing that out!

reviews.review_description: I really like rhythm vr games, and this one is one of the best I've played. Very rock and roll visual aesthetics. You wont see any well known artists here, but that is ok since all of the indie songs in this game are top notch. Not really any complaints. Great price compared to other games. Great pick up and play game to kill a few minutes. Recommended

Box to the Beat is fantastic experience! The movement with the music feels so satisfying. Reaching the highest score on the leaderboard was EPIC, adding an extra layer of excitement to the boxing gameplay.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words and for your continued support!
So much hard work went into making this game and your support means the world to us!

reviews.review_description: Tried the custom song support, didn’t work, contacted the devs, they were very helpful and it was actually quite easy to implement! Really liked multiple elements in the game , curious to see what happens when the world boss dies!

developer_response.body: happy to help out at any time! the world boss has been defeated btw! we will be releasing the loot to everyone in the coming patch :D!

reviews.review_description: Time to box to the beat!

reviews.review_title: A rising star in rhythms games!
reviews.review_description:
A refreshing touch to the boxing rhythm genre, 100s of custom songs to pick from since it has saber compatibility and the developers are constantly updating it even with their limited resources, hoping to see it on the main store soon!
Good job khosouf team

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the positive review, so glad to have met your expectations and we will keep pushing further with new levels, mods and game mods!

reviews.review_description: I love VR rhythm games and this one is one of the best I have ever played. The game has amazing graphics, sound, and gameplay that make you feel like you are in a musical world. The game has a variety of songs and modes to choose from. The game is very responsive and intuitive, and the motion controls are smooth and accurate. The game is also very challenging and rewarding, and it keeps me motivated to improve my skills and beat my high scores. This game is a must-have for any VR rhythm game fan. It is worth every penny and I highly recommend it. 5 stars!

developer_response.body:
Slendy! Thank you so much for the positive review and supporting us through the years of hard work.
I truly appreciate it.

reviews.review_description: So i tested this game at the Gamescom 2023 in Germany i think its definitely worth buying when you want a fun game to kill some time. So have fun playing it :)

developer_response.body:
That was the best Games Com ever!
Thank you so much and hope you continue enjoying our game, many more features and patches are incoming !

reviews.review_title: Impressions after playing for a week
reviews.review_description: Really good rhythm game. Menus are easy to navigate, the gloves and overall graphics look really cool, and there is a good song and glove selection (I think 30). You can also modify the game with a bunch of options like removing the obstacles and health bar to make it easier. Not really any complaints. Good price for what you get

developer_response.body: I'm so glad you enjoyed our game and thank you for your positive review, it sure helps us a lot!

reviews.review_description: yup I like it. I can see myself revisiting this one every once in a while. nice job

developer_response.body: keep an eye out for the upcoming updates ;) I'm sure you'll enjoy the new incoming content!

reviews.review_description: fun game. similar to other vr rhythm games, but I like this one more. it's more fun, and there are a nice amount of songs at launch. Nice game to play if you want to kill some time. I wanted to pet my dragon but I slapped him instead and felt bad.

developer_response.body: haha glad you noticed that little easter egg, surprisingly we noticed a lot of players punching the dragon instead of petting it so we added that feature.

reviews.review_description: if you play this game like it's meant to with high intensity, then you will work up a sweat after the first song that you play. You can seriously use this for your cardio for the day. Super fun. Good job!

I like it. A lot better than some other rhythm games I've played. The only problem is that I have to stop playing it after a few songs because my quest 2 becomes soaked with sweat and fogged up. I wish Meta had a solution for this!

developer_response.body:
if you are sweating, then our mission was successful!
Glad you are enjoying the game and remember to warm up before your boxing session :D

reviews.review_description: fun and challenging game! But that guy who is talking after the song is really mean if I don't do good. Hahaha! I don't usually like metal music, but the songs in this game are pretty good. Cool graphics too!

developer_response.body:
haha my apologies for mickey, he's a little intense sometimes if you score anything less than a B, we'll record more voice lines and add them into the next patch !
Thank you!

reviews.review_description: the new arcade mode is for sure where I want this game to go! Gives this game a more special twist to make it stand out,

developer_response.body:
so glad you guys enjoyed it! we'll make more creative power ups for you guys to enjoy!
Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Hi! I just got a quest 2 and this is one of the first VR games that I've ever played. It is soooo cool! my brother and I take turns playing it and we have so much fun!
Surprised by this one! Very decent boxing game!
